style_templates.name: Neutral
style_templates.instruction: Use direct descriptive language. Keep the result plain, factual, and style-neutral even when embellishment is high. Add ordinary visible details only. Avoid cinematic, dramatic, atmospheric, professional, masterpiece, award-winning, studio, commercial-photo, moody lighting, glow, dramatic shadow, cozy, majestic, sleek, and other stylized or decorative phrasing unless the user asked for it.

style_templates.name: Casual Snapshot
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel candid, ordinary, and natural. Prefer everyday wording. Avoid polished cinematic, editorial, commercial, or studio-style language.

style_templates.name: Amateur Photography
style_templates.instruction: The feeling of the result should be amateur and natural. Prefer everyday wording. Avoid polished cinematic, editorial, commercial, or studio-style language. The result should feel like a simple phone photo, but do not add props, events, extra subjects, landmarks, or new actions.

style_templates.name: Candid Photography
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like an unpolished candid phone-camera photo with everyday colors, imperfect exposure, simple lighting, and ordinary realism. This style changes only the photographic finish; do not add props, events, extra subjects, landmarks, or new actions.

style_templates.name: Tag Dense
style_templates.instruction: Prefer compact comma-separated visual tags. Avoid full sentences and avoid adding cinematic prose.

style_templates.name: Minimal
style_templates.instruction: Keep the prompt short and focused. Do not add extra mood, lighting, camera, quality, or production terms unless requested.

style_templates.name: Cinematic Perfect Quality
style_templates.instruction: Favor a polished cinematic image with excellent composition, rich lighting, high detail, clean focus, strong atmosphere, and premium production quality. Add quality language only where it supports the subject.

style_templates.name: Glamorous
style_templates.instruction: Favor a polished glam image with excellent composition, rich lighting, high detail, clean focus, and strong atmosphere. Add quality language only where it supports the subject. Use sexualized clothing, posing, or makeup only when the prompt explicitly describes an adult subject aged 18 or older; otherwise keep the styling glamorous but non-sexualized.

style_templates.name: Studio Photography
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like controlled studio photography. Emphasize clean backdrop, intentional posing or placement, professional lighting, crisp detail, and carefully arranged composition.

style_templates.name: Editorial Fashion
style_templates.instruction: Use a high-end editorial look with refined styling, confident composition, curated wardrobe or object presentation, elegant lighting, and magazine-quality visual polish.

style_templates.name: Product Photography
style_templates.instruction: Make the subject read clearly as a product or object shot. Emphasize clean presentation, controlled lighting, sharp detail, uncluttered background, and accurate visible features.

style_templates.name: Old Polaroid Photo
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like an old instant Polaroid photo. Favor casual framing, soft focus, faded colors, slight flash harshness, imperfect exposure, and nostalgic everyday realism.

style_templates.name: Analog Film Photo
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like analog film photography. Favor natural grain, imperfect exposure, subtle color shifts, organic contrast, and a lived-in photographic feel.

style_templates.name: Disposable Camera
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like a cheap disposable camera snapshot. Favor harsh flash, casual framing, slight blur, imperfect colors, mundane realism, and unpolished spontaneity.

style_templates.name: Documentary Photo
style_templates.instruction: Rephrase the prompt so it reads like the shot is from a documentary movie. Favor grounded realism, natural environments, honest composition, observable details, and minimal stylization.

style_templates.name: Dreamy Soft Focus
style_templates.instruction: Favor a soft, dreamy visual mood with gentle light, delicate contrast, muted detail, airy composition, and a calm atmospheric feel.

style_templates.name: Dark Moody
style_templates.instruction: Favor a darker moody look with controlled shadows, restrained highlights, atmospheric contrast, and a serious tone while keeping the subject readable.

style_templates.name: Vibrant Color Pop
style_templates.instruction: Favor bright, saturated colors, clear visual separation, energetic composition, and a lively polished result without changing the subject.

style_templates.name: Vintage Poster
style_templates.instruction: Make the result feel like a vintage illustrated poster. Favor bold shapes, limited palette, graphic composition, aged print texture, and clear subject readability.

style_templates.name: Concept Art
style_templates.instruction: The style is concept-art. Focus on language with clear design intent, readable silhouettes, low detail, visual development. Even when the original prompt says it's a photo, rewrite the prompt as concept-art.

style_templates.name: Painterly Illustration
style_templates.instruction: Favor painterly illustration qualities such as visible brushwork, artistic color choices, expressive lighting, and a composed hand-crafted feel.

style_templates.name: Silhouette
style_templates.instruction: Use a silhouette-focused visual style. Emphasize strong readable shapes, dark subject forms, clear outlines, minimal internal detail, and strong contrast between figure and background.

style_templates.name: Line Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use a clean line drawing style. Emphasize outlines, contour lines, simple visible details, minimal shading, and a hand-drawn graphic look.

style_templates.name: Pencil Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use a pencil drawing style. Emphasize graphite lines, soft sketch marks, light shading, visible strokes, and monochrome hand-drawn texture.

style_templates.name: Charcoal Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use a charcoal drawing style. Emphasize rough black strokes, smudged shading, high contrast, textured paper, and expressive hand-rendered marks.

style_templates.name: Ink Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use an ink drawing style. Emphasize crisp black ink lines, controlled hatching, bold contours, and clear graphic detail.

style_templates.name: Crayon Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use a crayon drawing style. Emphasize waxy texture, simple shapes, uneven hand-colored areas, playful marks, and childlike drawn charm.

style_templates.name: Colored Pencil
style_templates.instruction: Use a colored-pencil illustration style. Emphasize layered pencil strokes, textured color, soft shading, and hand-drawn detail.

style_templates.name: Watercolor
style_templates.instruction: Use a watercolor painting style. Emphasize translucent washes, soft color bleeding, gentle edges, paper texture, and light hand-painted detail.

style_templates.name: Oil Painting
style_templates.instruction: Use an oil painting style. Emphasize rich paint texture, visible brushstrokes, layered color, and traditional painted depth.

style_templates.name: Acrylic Painting
style_templates.instruction: Use an acrylic painting style. Emphasize bold opaque colors, visible brush texture, clean painted shapes, and a modern hand-painted finish.

style_templates.name: Pastel Drawing
style_templates.instruction: Use a pastel drawing style. Emphasize soft powdery color, smudged edges, gentle blending, and textured paper.

style_templates.name: Marker Illustration
style_templates.instruction: Use a marker illustration style. Emphasize bold marker strokes, smooth color blocks, clean graphic shapes, and hand-rendered shading.

style_templates.name: Comic Book
style_templates.instruction: Use a comic-book illustration style. Emphasize bold outlines, inked contours, simplified shading, clear action-readable forms, and graphic color.

style_templates.name: Manga Ink
style_templates.instruction: Use a manga ink style. Emphasize black-and-white linework, screentone-like shading, expressive outlines, and clean illustrated detail.

style_templates.name: Woodcut Print
style_templates.instruction: Use a woodcut print style. Emphasize carved-looking lines, high contrast, rough printed texture, limited tones, and bold graphic shapes.

style_templates.name: Paper Cutout
style_templates.instruction: Use a paper-cutout style. Emphasize layered flat shapes, crisp edges, simple color areas, and handmade collage-like construction.

style_templates.name: Pixel Art
style_templates.instruction: Use a pixel-art style. Emphasize low-resolution blocky shapes, limited palette, crisp pixel edges, and sprite-like readable detail.

style_templates.name: Claymation
style_templates.instruction: Use a claymation style. Emphasize handmade clay texture, rounded sculpted forms, subtle fingerprints, and stop-motion-like material detail.

style_templates.name: 3D Render
style_templates.instruction: Use a 3D-rendered style. Emphasize modeled forms, material surfaces, rendered lighting, and computer-generated visual clarity.

style_templates.name: Booru Tags
style_templates.instruction: Prefer booru-style comma-separated tags. Focus on subject, pose, setting, clothing or object details, expression, and composition. Avoid prose sentences.

style_templates.name: Realistic Natural Light
style_templates.instruction: Favor realistic natural-light photography. Emphasize believable light direction, natural color, grounded setting, and ordinary physical details.

style_templates.name: No Quality Tags
style_templates.instruction: Do not add quality tags or hype terms such as masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, award winning, cinematic, professional, or 8k. Keep only subject-relevant prompt content.

style_templates.name: Playful Anime
style_templates.instruction: Favor playful anime-style wording or tags. Avoid realism, cinematic photography, and professional studio phrasing unless requested.

style_templates.name: Erotic photography
style_templates.instruction: Apply an erotic-photography style only when the prompt explicitly describes every depicted person as an adult aged 18 or older. If age is absent, ambiguous, or under 18, do not sexualize the subject or expose intimate areas. For explicitly adult subjects, favor consensual sensual posing and styling without adding coercion, violence, or extra participants.
